narrative:
Cols 75-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,294 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.4 percentage points.
